Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCLIENTE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters4.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PesSts = nullvalue(&PesSts) &PesTip = nullvalue(&PesTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro Pessoas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &MarcaDesmarca.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &MarcaDesmarca.TooltipText = "" If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate.Link = wpPessoa.Link('WWCLIENTE', 'UPD', EmpCod, PesCod) For &SdtClienteXlsItem in &SdtClienteXls if &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesCod = PesCod &Marcado = true &MarcaDesmarca.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) exit //Somente se achar sai do Foe else &Marcado = false &MarcaDesmarca.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndIf EndFor EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector4.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ For each line in grid if &Marcado = false &SdtClienteXlsItem = New() &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesCod = PesCod &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesRaz = PesRaz &SdtClienteXls.Add(&SdtClienteXlsItem) EndIf EndFor Refresh msg('Todos Clientes desta página foram marcados.') Do 'TotalizaCount' EndEvent Event 'DoAjustar' if &SdtClienteXls.Count > 0 and &Count > 0 &webSession.Set('ATUALIZAGRUPOCLIENTE', &SdtClienteXls.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Ajustar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // wpAjustaClienteConfirm.Popup() // Refresh else msg('ATENÇÃO! Nenhum cliente selecionado.') EndIf EndEvent Event Ajustar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcAjustaClienteConfirm.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Ajustar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpfCnpj1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &PesCep1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &PesGruImpCod1.Visible = False &PesCliTraCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCEP' &PesCep1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' &PesGruImpCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpfCnpj2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &PesCep2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &PesGruImpCod2.Visible = False &PesCliTraCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCEP' &PesCep2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' &PesGruImpCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpfCnpj3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &PesCep3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &PesGruImpCod3.Visible = False &PesCliTraCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCEP' &PesCep3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' &PesGruImpCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpfCnpj4.Visible = False &PesCidNom4.Visible = False &PesCep4.Visible = False &RatCod4.Visible = False &PesGruImpCod4.Visible = False &PesCliTraCod4.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCEP' &PesCep4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' &PesGruImpCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod4.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj4.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCODRAZ" &PesCodRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESTIP" &PesTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' &PesCpfCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCEP' &PesCep1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' &PesGruImpCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCLITRACOD' &PesCliTraCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCODRAZ", "", not &PesCodRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCodRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESSTS", "", not &PesSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESTIP", "", not &PesTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesTip, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' AND not &PesCpfCnpj1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpfCnpj1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCEP' AND not &PesCep1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCep1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' AND not &PesGruImpCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesGruImpCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCLITRACOD' AND not &PesCliTraCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCliTraCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' AND not &PesCpfCnpj2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpfCnpj2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCEP' AND not &PesCep2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCep2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' AND not &PesGruImpCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesGruImpCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCLITRACOD' AND not &PesCliTraCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCliTraCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' AND not &PesCpfCnpj3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpfCnpj3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCEP' AND not &PesCep3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCep3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' AND not &PesGruImpCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesGruImpCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCLITRACOD' AND not &PesCliTraCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCliTraCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector4 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPFCNPJ' AND not &PesCpfCnpj4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpfCnpj4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCEP' AND not &PesCep4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCep4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESGRUIMPCOD' AND not &PesGruImpCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesGruImpCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCLITRACOD' AND not &PesCliTraCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCliTraCod4.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pessoa" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtClienteXls.Clear() Refresh Do 'TotalizaCount' msg('Todos Clientes foram desmarcados!') EndEvent Event &MarcaDesmarca.Click &AuxPesCod = PesCod &AuxPesRaz = PesRaz Do 'loadSdt' EndEvent Sub 'loadSdt' if &Marcado = false &SdtClienteXlsItem = New() &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesCod= &AuxPesCod &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesRaz = &AuxPesRaz &SdtClienteXls.Add(&SdtClienteXlsItem) else For &SdtClienteXlsItem in &SdtClienteXls If &SdtClienteXlsItem.PesCod = &AuxPesCod &Index = &SdtClienteXls.IndexOf(&SdtClienteXlsItem) &SdtClienteXls.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh EndSub Sub 'TotalizaCount' &Count.SetEmpty() &Count = &SdtClienteXls.Count EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
